title: System Design from First Principles
description: A definitive system-design book that ramps from beginner to expert: DDIA-grade theory on an interview-ready spine, plus the production engineering behind real systems. 65 lessons across nine modules — foundations, data & distributed systems, infrastructure building blocks, patterns, thirteen end-to-end case studies with clickable C4 architecture, production operations, and an interview playbook. Every claim sourced, every diagram rendered.
